scope.reason: newly added 12-subject corpus finding cluster requiring an independent check before round17 interpretation

recommendations.findingCluster: devtools imports extension internals instead of extension public entries
recommendations.rationale: The reviewed manifest allows devtools to consume extension, but the observed imports target extension-owned internal source paths rather than public entries.

recommendations.findingCluster: website imports @floating-ui/react without a reviewed consumer edge to react
recommendations.rationale: The reviewed manifest leaves website consumes empty while the findings resolve @floating-ui/react to the react cell.

recommendations.findingCluster: website writes images.json without a declared file resource or artifact allowance
recommendations.rationale: The evidence graph reports no policy defect and the reviewed manifest does not declare the observed file write selector.

limitations: This is not an external human or organization label.
This supplemental review covers the floating-ui cluster, not every round17 finding.
The sealed claim labels remain raterType=agent and do not satisfy a public external precision claim.
